creator: c.kworr@gmail.com
text:
23.10.2013 14:25, Kubilay Kocak wrote:
> Hi Volodymyr,
>
> Can you provide an updated version of your patch with the following
> changes please:
>
> - Revert to using conventional USE_GITHUB and GH_* variables [1]

Done.

> - Set USE_PYTHON=-2.7 unless your module works on every version [2]

2.7, that's strict because some of requirements doesn't work on 2.6.

> - Capitalize product names (MySQL, PostgreSQL) in COMMENT [3]

Done.

> - Confirm whether LICENSE *is* MIT, remove if you're unsure [4]

Rechecked. MIT indeed.

> - Update your PyPI entry ;) [5]

Not mine to frob... I'm not a project master, just fixing some bugs.

> [1] If USE_GITHUB is broken, we should fix that, instead of in each port
> [2] Your setup.py says 2.6 and 2.7 only

2.7 only, just checked.

> [3] Like you have here: https://github.com/philipsoutham/py-mysql2pgsql
> [4] If modification of MIT, include LICENSE_FILE, if not, remove it.
> [5] https://pypi.python.org/pypi/py-mysql2pgsql
>
> Thanks for your submission :)

Any other of my pr's for review? Pweeeease!!! :)

-- 
Sphinx of black quartz, judge my vow.
